name: workflow profile registration dry-run does not modify the profile yaml file
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/register-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --workflow-stage architect --dry-run 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'workflow_stages:' profiles/p.yaml && grep -q 'planned: register architect' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
